info.title: p2u
info.description: Paste text content with Unix like line endings into Windows Terminal without line breakings

commands.name: dir
commands.description: Set all profiles with the current folder location as the starting directory.

options.name: --reset
options.description:
Reset to the Windows Terminal starting directory defaults
which is "%USERPROFILE%".

arguments.name: value
arguments.description: Fully qualified path to the Windows Terminal settings.json

commands.name: pst
commands.description: Paste the text content that you copied from the Internet.

options.name: --silent
options.description: Run without print any feedback message.

options.name: --cmd
options.description: Paste text content into cmd/DOS with Windows Terminal.

options.name: --vim
options.description: Paste text content into Vim with Windows Terminal.

options.name: --powershell
options.description: Paste text content into Powershell with Windows Terminal.

options.name: --git-bash
options.description: Paste text content into Git Bash with Windows Terminal.

options.name: --wsl
options.description:
(Default: true) Paste text content into WSL (Windows
Subsystem for Linux) with Windows Terminal.
